title: Inventory question mark
description: This project changes all textures in the inventory to "?".
body:
- This project changes all textures in the inventory to **"?"**, good for use with "Letter to Morse code translation".
- **You can no longer see the item textures in the inventory.**
- When this resource pack is used in combination with "Letter to Morse code translation", the blocks in the inventory can only be identified by their Morse code characters.
- Here you will find **["Letter to Morse code translation"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/letter-to-morse-code-translation)**

# important
_If you want to use the texture pack for your modpacks, feel free to do so, but please write the following in the description below: Important: Contains the resource pack [Inventory question mark] by [GuSchu Gaming], licensed under CC BY 4.0._
